title: Custom Item Highlighter
description: A Fabric Mod that creates a border overlay over items in your inventory to show you at a glance what items are custom. Designed for LumaMC.
body:
Highlights custom server items in container GUIs with a semi-transparent color overlay, making it easy to spot plugin-created or specially-named items at a glance. This mod was specifically designed for LumaMC, effectiveness may not be guaranteed on other servers.


# How it works
When you open any container (chest, inventory, shop, etc.), Custom Item Highlighter scans each slot and draws a colored overlay on any item that has been modified by a server plugin — either through a custom display name or custom NBT data. No more squinting at item names to figure out what's special.

Items with "tier" in the lore get a border the color of the tier, with multi-colored tiers getting a color warp effect that goes through all the colors of that tier.

![Relics being highlighted](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d2234ac85b36182a4ce2cd01bcec0020f4e55f56.png)

Items without the "tier" keyword use the first color that appears in the item name.

![Custom items without Tiers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e4c06d070fefb9859ae0c391090da3bd2161629f.png)

Items with neither default to white.

# Features
- Two detection methods:
- Custom name — flags items with a plugin-set display name
- Custom data — flags items with custom NBT attached by a plugin
- Master toggle — disable highlighting entirely without touching other settings
- In-game config — tweak everything live via Mod Menu (optional)

# Requirements
- Fabric Loader 0.18.6+
- Fabric API 0.141.3+1.21.11
- Minecraft 1.21.11
- Cloth Config is bundled — no extra install needed. Mod Menu is optional but recommended for in-game settings.
